sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n21014" key="brodo/paxus" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βροδόπᾱχυς</orth>, <sense id="n21014.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ῥοδόπηχυς</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sapph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">65</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
